subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! A detailed letter has been received from his honor, the kind Isfandiyar, giving a comprehensive account [3.5s]... ...Concerning “wings” and “the comb” mentioned in the Hidden Words: this means the Covenant of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی نامه مفصلی از جناب اسفندیار مهربان رسید حکایت از شرح کشاف
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly, @justice and wrath of God
